title: Wearino
shortDescription: Modern AI-powered online shopping platform designed for fashion brands.
mainFeatures: AI recommendation engine for personalized shopping
Smart search with natural language support
overview: Wearino is an end-to-end AI-powered eCommerce platform built specifically for modern fashion brands. It delivers an intuitive, personalized shopping experience while providing robust backend management tools to streamline operations.

features.title: Hyper-Personalization
features.description: AI models analyze user behavior in real-time to suggest the most relevant products, boosting conversion rates.

features.title: Visual Search
features.description: Allow customers to upload images and find visually similar products instantly within your catalog.

features.title: Smart Inventory Management
features.description: Predictive analytics help forecast demand, minimizing overstock and stockouts.

faqs.question: Can Wearino integrate with my existing ERP?
faqs.answer: Yes, Wearino offers robust APIs and pre-built connectors for major ERP systems.

faqs.question: How long does implementation take?
faqs.answer: A standard deployment typically takes 4-6 weeks depending on data migration requirements.

title: Stroovo
shortDescription: Intelligent workspace designed to centralize team collaboration, AI agents, and task management.
overview: Stroovo is the next-generation workspace platform that natively integrates AI into your team's daily workflows. From managing projects to drafting documents with intelligent AI copilots, Stroovo centralizes productivity.

features.title: AI Copilot Integration
features.description: Draft emails, summarize threads, and generate reports without leaving your workspace.

features.title: Intelligent Task Routing
features.description: Automatically assign tasks based on team capacity and expertise.

features.title: Centralized Knowledge Base
features.description: Chat with your company documents and find answers instantly using RAG technology.

faqs.question: Is our data secure and private?
faqs.answer: Yes, Stroovo employs enterprise-grade encryption and ensures your data is never used to train public AI models.

faqs.question: Can we bring our own LLM models?
faqs.answer: Enterprise customers have the option to connect their own custom models or dedicated API keys.

title: University LMS
shortDescription: Scalable, AI-enhanced learning management system for modern educational institutions.
overview: Our White-label University LMS is designed to bring educational institutions into the AI era. It offers a fully customizable platform that supports adaptive learning, simplifying administration while elevating the student experience.

features.title: Adaptive Learning Paths
features.description: Dynamically adjust course difficulty and content based on student performance.

features.title: AI Grading Assistant
features.description: Automate grading for assignments and quizzes, providing instant, constructive feedback.

features.title: Virtual Classroom & Proctoring
features.description: Integrated video conferencing with smart AI proctoring for secure assessments.

faqs.question: Can we customize the branding?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. It's a fully white-label solution allowing complete customization of colors, logos, and domains.

faqs.question: Does it support SCORM?
faqs.answer: Yes, the LMS is fully compliant with SCORM and xAPI standards.

title: D-MRSCE
category: Deep Multimodal Retrieval Summarization Chat Engine
shortDescription: Advanced multimodal search and research engine combining text, image, and document analysis.
overview: D-MRSCE (Deep Multimodal Retrieval Summarization Chat Engine) is an enterprise-grade research engine. It empowers organizations to search across vast, unstructured datasets including text, images, and complex documents with unprecedented accuracy.

features.title: Multimodal Vector Search
features.description: Search using text to find images, or use images to find related documents using unified embeddings.

features.title: Deep Research Agents
features.description: Deploy autonomous agents to synthesize large volumes of research papers into actionable insights.

features.title: Explainable AI Citations
features.description: Every claim generated by the system includes precise citations back to the source documents.

benefits: Uncover hidden patterns in unstructured data

faqs.question: How does D-MRSCE handle sensitive documents?
faqs.answer: It can be deployed entirely on-premise or in a private cloud to ensure strict data sovereignty.

faqs.question: What document formats are supported?
faqs.answer: D-MRSCE natively supports PDFs, Word documents, Excel, PPTs, images, and raw text files.

title: Future Products
shortDescription: We are constantly innovating. More groundbreaking AI products are currently in development.
